AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment 
variable name (Can also be supplied via the 
'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)

options.description:
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment 
variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID'
environment variable)

options.name: --private-key
options.description:
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or 
environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the
'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)

bundleids create Mac App com.mycompany.macapp MAC_OS

commands.name: provision

options.name: --api-issuer-id
options.description:
AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment 
variable name (Can also be supplied via the 
'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)

options.name: --api-key-id
options.description:
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment 
variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID'
environment variable)

options.name: --api-private-key
options.description:
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or 
environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the
'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)

options.name: --api-private-key-dir
options.description:
Specifies a path to save the AppStoreConnect 
Private Key (.p8) file to if --install-api-private-key is true.  Default 
directory path is "~/private_keys/".

options.name: --bundle-identifier
options.description:
App bundle identifier(s) to match provisioning 
profiles for

options.name: --certificate
options.description:
Base64 encoded certificate data, certificate 
filename, or environment variable name with base 64 encoded certificate data

options.name: --certificate-passphrase
options.description: Certificate's passphrase

options.name: --install-api-private-key
options.description:
If true, installs the --api-private-key 
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) (if specified) to the --api-private-key-dir 
location.  You are responsible for removing this key if you do not want it to 
persist.

options.name: --keychain
options.description: Keychain name to import into

options.name: --keychain-allow-any-app-read
options.description: Allows any app read permission

options.name: --keychain-disallow-any-app-read
options.description: Allows any app read permission

options.name: --keychain-password
options.description: Keychain password

options.name: --profile-path
options.description:
Override default directory to save downloaded 
profiles to

options.name: --profile-type
options.description: Provisioning profile type(s) to match / download

commands.description:
Sets up CI environment with certificates, keychain, 
and provisioning profiles
examples:
ci provision --certificate IOS_CERT_BASE64 --bundle-identifier 
com.myapp.id --app-store-connect-key-id ABC123DEF4 --app-store-connect-issuer-id
12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012 --app-store-connect-private-key 
ASC_PRIVATE_KEY_BASE64

commands.name: create

options.name: --all-devices
options.description:
Include all enabled devices for the platform 
(alternative to --devices)

options.name: --bundle-id
options.description:
Bundle ID resource ID or bundle identifier (e.g., 
'ABC123' or 'com.example.app')

options.name: --certificates
options.description: Certificate IDs (comma-separated)

options.name: --devices
options.description:
Device IDs (comma-separated, for dev/adhoc 
profiles)

options.name: --download
options.description: Download profile after creation

options.name: --issuer-id
options.description:
AppStoreConnect Issuer ID value or environment 
variable name (Can also be supplied via the 
'APP_STORE_CONNECT_ISSUER_ID' environment variable)

options.name: --key-id
options.description:
AppStoreConnect Key ID value or environment 
variable name (Can also be supplied via the 'APP_STORE_CONNECT_KEY_ID'
environment variable)

options.name: --name
options.description: Profile name

options.name: --private-key
options.description:
AppStoreConnect Private Key (.p8) filename or 
environment variable name with (.p8) file contents (Can also be supplied via the
'APP_STORE_CONNECT_PRIVATE_KEY' environment variable)

options.name: --type
options.description:
Profile type (e.g., IOS_APP_DEVELOPMENT, 
IOS_APP_STORE)

commands.description:
Creates a new provisioning profile in App Store 
Connect
examples:
provisioning create --name My App Dev Profile --type 
IOS_APP_DEVELOPMENT --bundle-id BNDL123 --certificates CERT456 --devices 
DEV789,DEV012

provisioning create --name My App Store Profile --type 
IOS_APP_STORE --bundle-id BNDL123 --certificates CERT456

provisioning create --name My Dev Profile --type 
IOS_APP_DEVELOPMENT --bundle-id BNDL123 --certificates CERT456,CERT789 
--all-devices --download
